name: I Love You Silly
overview: Lily is a naive high school girl. She is often taken advantage of by her friend, Jourdy. Mira, her other friend, then introduces Lily to her cousin, Jojo. Meanwhile, there is a new eccentric student, Gia, who catches Jourdy's attention. Will the presence of Gia and Jojo between Lily and Jourdy ignite their true feelings for each other?

trailers.title: OFFICIAL TRAILER I LOVE YOU SILLY
